name: similar_cases_precedents

legal_basis.description: Legal provisions cited (e.g., 'art. 15 ustawy o VAT')

similar_case_ids.description: IDs or signatures of similar cases mentioned

unfavorable_factors.description: Factors that may weaken the client's position

key_legal_arguments.description: Most important legal arguments to pursue

similar_cases_outcome.description: Pattern of outcomes in similar cases
